key_operative_terms.grant: Right to adopt and use Sonic System at Site during Term (§2.01)
key_operative_terms.principal_definition: >50% ownership, authority to direct management, devote sufficient time (§1.16)
key_operative_terms.business_entity_requirements: Only franchisee authorized to operate; must be tenant under lease; must own/lease all operating assets (§2.02)
key_operative_terms.proprietary_marks_scope: Trade names, trademarks, service marks, emblems, trade dress, signs, menu housings, designs, color schemes, canopies, equipment layout — as Sonic designates (§1.17)
key_operative_terms.sonic_system_elements: Marks, confidential info, food/beverage methods, recipes, service accessories, building specs, methods/techniques, marketing, business operations, PAYS (§1.19)
key_operative_terms.innovations_assignment: All innovations are Sonic's property as works-made-for-hire; franchisee assigns all rights; no compensation (§9.05)
key_operative_terms.confidential_information: Broad definition including recipes, specs, customer data, manuals, website passwords; no interest acquired; no duplication (§10.01-10.02)
key_operative_terms.sbf_administration: Sonic has sole discretion; 15% admin fee capped at actual costs; audited; not Sonic asset; perpetual but terminable (§12.03)
key_operative_terms.advertising_approval: All advertising using marks requires prior approval; deemed disapproved if no response in 30 days (§12.04)
key_operative_terms.post_termination_obligations: Pay all amounts due; cease use of marks/return manuals; de-identify within 30 days; remove signs/housings/PAYS; change exterior/interior design and color scheme as directed; Sonic may enter premises to make changes at franchisee expense (§16.01)
key_operative_terms.option_to_purchase_proprietary_assets: Upon expiration/termination, Sonic has right to purchase patented, special, or unique Sonic equipment, menu housings, signs, menus, and supplies at fair market value (§16.02)
key_operative_terms.noncompete_enforcement: Any violation results in irreparable injury; franchisee consents to ex parte restraining orders, TROs, permanent injunctions (§17)
key_operative_terms.independent_contractor: Not fiduciary, agent, partner, joint venturer, or employee; not joint employers; Sonic does not control working conditions except quality protection (§18.01)
key_operative_terms.indemnification: Broad indemnification of Sonic against all losses from restaurant development/operation, FA breach, noncompliance with laws, employment claims, IP claims (§18.03)
key_operative_terms.enforcement_costs: Prevailing party recovers costs and attorneys' fees (§18.02)
